subcodes.first_line: O living flame of heavenly love! Thine heart hath been so fired with the love of God that from ten thousand leagues afar
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نار افروخته عشق الهی حرارت محبه الله در آن قلب نورانی چنان پر شعله و سورت
subcodes.subjects: @fire and light; fire and water, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
